description: Generates documentation for the code in the clipboard, in the language specified in the parameters
author: Neeqstock
systemMessage: Generate §{Languagee} documentation for the code which I provide you. The code is written in §{Language}. Answer only with the documentation, without providing any other answer in natural language. Use the correct syntax for §{Language} documentation entries. DO NOT include the code I send you in your answer. Your documentation should be meaningful, and describe what the code does at a high level.
